steps.title: Use the smaller triangle
steps.content: Since $WX$ is perpendicular to $YZ$, triangle $WYX$ is right. It shares angle $Y$ with triangle $XYZ$, so the two right triangles are similar.

steps.title: Relate the tangent values
steps.content:
In triangle $WYX$, angle $X$ corresponds to angle $Z$ in triangle $XYZ$. For angle $X$, the opposite side is $WY$ and the adjacent side is $WX$.
$$\tan Z=\frac{WY}{WX}$$

steps.title: Simplify the ratio
steps.content: Substitute the given lengths and reduce. $$\tan Z=\frac{924}{385}=\frac{12\cdot77}{5\cdot77}=\frac{12}{5}$$ The answer is D.
